_comment: Registry of candidate provers (algorithm track). Each entry maps a stack name to a native `bb` binary — typically rebuilt from modified barretenberg C++ (MSM, FFT/NTT, polynomial memory layout, ...). 'BASELINE' resolves to the pinned reference binary (~/.bb/bb or $BASELINE_BB). The pinned problem + fixed config are identical for every stack; only the prover binary changes.

baseline.notes: The reference prover. The number every candidate must beat.
